text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having deemed that both her ability and
physique are at a sufficient level, I've chosen to
enter Mejiro Ardan in the Satsuki Sho. Even
before her first-ever classic G1 race, she looks
incredibly composed.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeing that Mejiro Ardan quietly harbors a
fervent desire to win, Yaeno Muteki and Sakura
Chiyono O find their own competitive spirit
suddenly ignited.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The great battle that is the Satsuki Sho—the first
race of the Classic Triple Crown—is about to
unfold!
